sourcePrompt: An M113 armored personnel carrier, about five meters long, flat and boxy on its tracks. A slab-sided aluminum hull with a steeply sloped bow plate, a flat roof carrying a small commander's cupola with a .50 caliber machine gun, a tall flat rear panel hiding the drop ramp, and tracks running over five evenly spaced road wheels per side with a drive sprocket forward. About two meters tall, the proportions of an armored shoebox. Olive-drab, utilitarian.
handEdit: front rework: trim vane laid flat on the 32deg glacis (was perpendicular to it - the flap); spare road wheel deleted from the glacis (not a real M113 fitment, sat cocked on the wrong axis - the weird wheel)
